title: Software Engineer
description:
About Us:

At BYD Singapore, we're driving the future of sustainable transportation with cutting-edge electric vehicles that combine advanced technology, stylish design, and unmatched performance. As a fast-growing company committed to reducing carbon footprints and revolutionizing the automotive industry, we’re looking for a dynamic Software Engineer to join our team and help accelerate our brand’s growth.

Roles & Responsibilities:

According to the department planning and the needs of the model project, formulate the product technical scheme; complete the design of the product architecture, software and hardware scheme design and review:

1. Participate in the analysis of the product software requirements to ensure the feasibility of software requirements

2. Participate in the design and evaluation of software architecture schemes to ensure that the output complies with the software design and development process requirements for software architecture design specifications

3. Participate in the implementation of software detailed design, output code or model in accordance with coding standards

4. Participate in the implementation unit verification, output static check report, code review report

5. Participate in the implementation of software component integration strategies to ensure efficient coordination between different modules

postedCompany.description:
HDT SINGAPORE HOLDING PTE. LTD.

We are creating a clean, pollution-free future. Powered by electric vehicles. This is our vision for a Singapore that’s charged up by HDT. HDT Holdings Pte Ltd is the Singapore agent of BYD Co. Ltd a leader in the field of  IT, Automobiles and New Energy . 

Going green means so much more than saving the environment. It means building a brand, lifestyle and community that shares similar values. It means living in a clean, vibrant environment with fresh air.

It means utilising the power of electricity to fuel our vehicles, providing taxi, bus, chauffeur and concierge services, and more.

Among its many accolades, BYD Co. Ltd holds the distinction of being the first company in the world to announce plans for building an Electric Vehicle using the environmentally-friendly Fe battery . BYD Co, Ltd has also let the way by being the first organisation (Globally) to provide a fully vertically integrated solution for green energy technologies. 

At HDT Singapore Holdings we believe in :

1. Creating an environmentally -friendly business with Zero emission electric vehicles. 

2. Our ability to grow our business into a globally - recogonized brand and a leading specialist in green vehicles. 

3. Achieving Cost-effectiveness through low fuel (Energy) costs. 

4. Offering customers life-enhancing, differentiated services.
postedCompany.name: HDT SINGAPORE HOLDING PTE. LTD.
